zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Coucy於大約1225年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，她的父親Enguerrand III de Coucy44歲，母親Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy27歲。她與Comte Arnould III de Guines結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1260年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Coucy于大约1225年出生在法国皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可时，她的父亲Enguerrand III de Coucy44岁，母亲Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy27岁。她与Comte Arnould III de Guines结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1260年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): nickname from Middle English couch(e) ‘hump, hunch’, used for a hunchback. In Cornwall and Devon it is usually pronounced as Cooch.
English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Gooch  .

English (Cornwall and Devon): from Middle English coche, couche ‘bed, couch, tablecloth’ (Old French couche, culche). It could have been a metonymic occupational name for someone who made such items or a nickname for a lazy individual. Alternatively, it could have been applied to someone who produced couchwork, a luxurious embroidery in which gold or silver thread and jewels were sewn into satin or silk robes.

variants.name: Gooch
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the rare Middle English personal name Goche (also found as Joche). It was current in East Anglia from the early 12th to the early 13th centuries as a variant of Anglo-Norman French Go(s)ce, Jo(s)ce, a pet form of Old French Goscelin.
English: alternatively, a nickname from Anglo-Norman French gouge (from Latin gobio), the nominative form of Old French goujon (from Latin gobionem) ‘gudgeon’, perhaps for a gullible person.

Welsh: in southwestern England, possibly an Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’, though the sound change is irregular. Compare Gough . It may also be a variant of Cornish and Welsh Couch , with the same meaning.

variants.name: Gush
meanings: English (Devon and Dorset): probably a variant of Gudge, itself a variant of Couch or Gooch .

variants.name: Coach
meanings: Possibly also an Americanized form of French Canadian or French   Coache  .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Coucy was born about 1225, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, her father, Enguerrand III de Coucy, was 44 and her mother, Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy, was 27. She married Comte Arnould III de Guines. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1260, in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Coucy est née environ 1225, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Enguerrand III de Coucy, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Comte Arnould III de Guines. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1260, à Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Coucy um 1225 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand III de Coucy 44 und ihre Mutter Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy 27. Sie hat Comte Arnould III de Guines geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1260 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Coucy è nata il circa 1225 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Enguerrand III de Coucy, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Comte Arnould III de Guines. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1260, nel Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Coucyが約1225年にフランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Enguerrand III de Coucyは44歳，母Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisyは27歳であった。Comte Arnould III de Guinesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1260年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスグiンスで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Coucy(이)가 대략 1225년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand III de Coucy(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Comte Arnould III de Guines(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1260년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 구i네스에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Coucy nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Enguerrand III de Coucy, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Comte Arnould III de Guines. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1260, em Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Coucy родилась около 1225 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Enguerrand III de Coucy было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Comte Arnould III de Guines. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1260 г. в местности гуiнесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Coucy nació aproximadamente 1225, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand III de Coucy, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Marie de Montmirail et d'Oisy, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Comte Arnould III de Guines. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1260, en Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 36 años.
